title: SelfHelp unified registry index (registry.json)
description: The single published registry.json consumed by BOTH installers: the SelfHelp Manager (core/frontend/scheduler/worker Docker releases) and the CMS/backend (plugin releases). Every component array is a list of release REFS (one per published version) pointing at standalone signed release documents via releaseUrl. Mirrors @selfhelp/shared RegistryIndex and the Manager Zod schema. Release documents are validated by core-release.schema.json / plugin-release.schema.json. Supersedes the legacy single-version inline plugin registry.

requiresManager.description: Semver range of SelfHelp Manager versions that can consume this registry.

baseUrl.description: Base URL used to resolve relative releaseUrl / artifact paths.

releaseUrl.description: Absolute or baseUrl-relative URL of the signed release document.
